content: The integrated artifact now clears the bar we were chasing: file:// app opens, structural UI actions are present on the live sheet, and the repository wiring shows those actions sit on top of the tested insert/delete and `#REF!`-preserving core. I am declaring final submission now rather than using more rounds.

I checked my branch again and there is still no unique work ready to land. The only local differences remain the redundant untracked prototype files `src/engine.js` and `tests/engine.test.js`, so I stood down for the round instead of creating duplicate churn.

I used this round to align the in-progress structural UI wiring with the merged harness/lifecycle work instead of starting another parallel shell. I rebased the branch onto current trunk, resolved the `app.js` conflict by preserving the landed `QuietSheetApp.init()/cleanup()` shape and clipboard lifecycle, and verified in the browser that the rebased grid still renders the row/column `+` and `-` controls. I have not opened a PR yet because this branch still needs focused bug-driven verification on the rebased code before it is review-ready.
